scripts.test: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,hosting --project purpl-crm 'npx playwright test'
scripts.test:headed: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,hosting --project purpl-crm 'npx playwright test --headed'
scripts.test:ui: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,hosting --project purpl-crm 'npx playwright test --ui'
scripts.test:debug: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,hosting --project purpl-crm 'PWDEBUG=1 npx playwright test'
